Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Boston-Power.

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Boston-Power (Jiangsu) Co., Ltd. presents a profound case of a dormant mega-factory or structurally reorganized heavy-asset entity. Forensic data reconstruction successfully salvaged its true identity, which had been completely overwritten by its USCC in the raw data. Despite a colossal paid-in capital of $143.39 million USD and its status as a wholly foreign-owned enterprise within the Liyang EV battery hub, its employment data (173 employees) has been completely frozen since 2017. This severe time-lag, contrasted with its massive capitalization, unequivocally indicates a heavy-asset lithium-ion battery plant that has suspended active production, entered restructuring, or become a dormant industrial asset. Furthermore, its 'Radar Manufacturing' industry classification is a blatant misregistration; corporate emails (@boston-power.com) and business scope confirm its true identity as an EV power cell manufacturer.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 72)
Operational Status: DORMANT / RESTRUCTURING (FROZEN SINCE 2017)
